name: Spaghetti Squash
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Grated zucchini or diced green pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the spaghetti squash in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds.
2. Place the squash, cut side down, in a pot of simmering water. Cover and cook for 15 minutes.
3. Holding the hot squash with a potholder, run the tines of a fork across its pulp.
4. The strands will separate like magic—your spaghetti is ready!
5. Mix the pasta strands with the cheeses, zucchini or peppers, tomato sauce, oregano, garlic powder, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
6. Scoop the mixture back into the squash shells.
7. Top with Parmesan cheese and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
